tasks.title: Trace canonical startup loading path
tasks.summary: Measure and localize the long 載入中... phase on the canonical AppShell runtime.
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Read coordination/llm-bus/runtime-execution-plan.md and coordination/llm-bus/runtime-stabilization-brief.md. Investigate the startup path behind the long 載入中... phase on the canonical AppShell runtime at http://127.0.0.1:3002. Do not widen scope. Return: findings, likely root cause, smallest safe next step, and verification.

tasks.title: Choose smallest operability fix
tasks.summary: After startup tracing, decide whether to optimize runtime work, improve loading UX, or do a mixed fix.
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Read coordination/llm-bus/runtime-execution-plan.md and coordination/llm-bus/runtime-stabilization-brief.md. Use the latest startup-trace evidence to choose the smallest safe Wave 4 fix: performance first, loading UX first, or mixed. Reply with: decision, why, and the smallest patch shape.

tasks.title: Audit remaining route-shell propagation gaps
tasks.summary: Identify route-shell tests that still only prove local storage or route-local context.
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Read coordination/llm-bus/runtime-execution-plan.md and coordination/llm-bus/runtime-stabilization-brief.md. Inspect route-shell tests and list the remaining cases that only validate route-local truth instead of main-runtime propagation. Return: priority-ordered gaps and the smallest next guard to add.

tasks.title: Check user-facing startup blind spots
tasks.summary: Validate whether the startup issue feels like slowness, emptiness, or wrong workflow cues.
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Read coordination/llm-bus/runtime-execution-plan.md and coordination/llm-bus/runtime-stabilization-brief.md. Focus only on the user-facing blind spots in the startup path. Return: what feels broken first, and the smallest wording/loading cue fix if performance is not the whole issue.

tasks.title: Bootstrap Agent Bridge task model
tasks.summary: Add a task layer above sessions so Agent Bridge can list, assign, and dispatch structured work.
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Read coordination/llm-bus/runtime-execution-plan.md and docs/vscode-agent-bridge/README.md. Implement the smallest task/dispatch layer that can sit on top of existing sessions without breaking the current mobile terminal workflow. Return changed files and verification.

tasks.title: Move trade backfill out of pre-ready gate
tasks.summary: Keep the new boot shell, but move trade backfill into post-ready maintenance and refresh the live snapshot if the patch mutates persisted data.
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Read coordination/llm-bus/runtime-execution-plan.md and coordination/llm-bus/runtime-stabilization-brief.md. Move applyTradeBackfillPatchesIfNeeded() out of the pre-ready gate, then refresh the live runtime snapshot before cloud holdings adoption if the patch reports changes. Return: changed files, regression coverage, and before/after ready timings.

tasks.title: Add soft verify gate to Agent Bridge
tasks.summary: Introduce completion evidence and a soft verify gate so task completion is backed by changed files, verification runs, and consensus state.
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Read coordination/llm-bus/runtime-execution-plan.md and docs/vscode-agent-bridge/README.md. Add the smallest soft verify gate that introduces completion evidence without breaking existing task dispatch flows. Return: changed files, API/UI changes, and verification.

tasks.title: Lift workflow cue into the AppShell header
tasks.summary: Reuse the shared operating context in the canonical Header so the current next step is visible across tabs without triggering new API work.
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Read coordination/llm-bus/runtime-execution-plan.md and coordination/llm-bus/runtime-stabilization-brief.md. Add a header-level workflow cue in the canonical AppShell using existing derived state only. It must be navigation-only and should not expand the route shell.

tasks.title: Add explicit consensus gate to Agent Bridge
tasks.summary: Major tasks now require explicit consensus reviews instead of a writable consensusState field, and downstream dispatch is blocked until required dependencies clear consensus.
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Read coordination/llm-bus/runtime-execution-plan.md and docs/vscode-agent-bridge/README.md. Extend the soft verify gate into a minimal explicit consensus gate: add review capture, prevent generic PATCH from bypassing it, and surface consensus progress in the dashboard.

tasks.title: Guard daily analysis behind live review backlog cues
tasks.summary: When events are already due for review, the daily-analysis entry point now warns first, routes back to the exact pending review, and only runs analysis through an explicit override.
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Read coordination/llm-bus/runtime-execution-plan.md and coordination/llm-bus/runtime-stabilization-brief.md. Add the smallest daily-analysis guard that uses live review backlog state to steer the user back into event/news review before firing a new expensive analysis call. Keep a manual override and do not add new API work.

tasks.title: Introduce staged FinMind-backed daily review
tasks.summary: Daily analysis now distinguishes same-day `收盤快版` vs `資料確認版`, bypasses stale FinMind cache on confirmation reruns, and keeps both same-day versions in history.
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Read coordination/llm-bus/runtime-execution-plan.md, coordination/llm-bus/runtime-stabilization-brief.md, and coordination/llm-bus/runs/20260411-122012/*.md. Land the smallest staged daily-review patch that makes FinMind confirmation explicit without adding background scheduling.

consensusReviews.summary: Adopt T0/T1 staging with visible preliminary labeling and data-presence gating.
Keep the staged rerun machine-readable and idempotent instead of silently overwriting same-day reports.

verificationRuns: bunx vitest run tests/lib/finmindPromptRuntime.test.js tests/lib/finmindAdapter.test.js tests/lib/dailyAnalysisRuntime.test.js tests/hooks/useDailyAnalysisWorkflow.test.jsx tests/components/AppPanels.contexts.test.jsx
risksNoted: T1 is still manual-trigger only; background scheduling has not landed yet
Gemini did not provide a usable vote in this run and was treated as non-blocking
evidence.nextStep: Add an explicit same-day T1 trigger policy and a diff view so users can compare fast close vs confirmed rerun.
